Name: USpinBox
Description: A numerical entry box that allows for direct entry of the number or allows the user to click and slide the number.

Variables.Name: Value
Variables.Description: Value stored in this spin box

Variables.Name: ValueDelegate
Variables.Description: A bindable delegate to allow logic to drive the value of the widget

Variables.Name: Delta
Variables.Description: The amount by which to change the spin box value as the slider moves.

Variables.Name: SliderExponent
Variables.Description: The exponent by which to increase the delta as the mouse moves. 1 is constant (never increases the delta).

Variables.Name: Justification
Variables.Description: The justification the value text should appear as.

Variables.Name: MinDesiredWidth
Variables.Description: The minimum width of the spin box

Variables.Name: ClearKeyboardFocusOnCommit
Variables.Description: Whether to remove the keyboard focus from the spin box when the value is committed

Variables.Name: SelectAllTextOnCommit
Variables.Description: Whether to select the text in the spin box when the value is committed

Variables.Name: bOverride_MinValue
Variables.Description: Whether the optional MinValue attribute of the widget is set

Variables.Name: bOverride_MaxValue
Variables.Description: Whether the optional MaxValue attribute of the widget is set

Variables.Name: bOverride_MinSliderValue
Variables.Description: Whether the optional MinSliderValue attribute of the widget is set

Variables.Name: bOverride_MaxSliderValue
Variables.Description: Whether the optional MaxSliderValue attribute of the widget is set

Variables.Name: MinValue
Variables.Description: The minimum allowable value that can be manually entered into the spin box

Variables.Name: MaxValue
Variables.Description: The maximum allowable value that can be manually entered into the spin box

Variables.Name: MinSliderValue
Variables.Description: The minimum allowable value that can be specified using the slider

Variables.Name: MaxSliderValue
Variables.Description: The maximum allowable value that can be specified using the slider

Functions.Name: GetValue
Functions.Description: Get the current value of the spin box.

Functions.Name: SetValue
Functions.Description: Set the value of the spin box.

Functions.Name: GetMinValue
Functions.Description: Get the current minimum value that can be manually set in the spin box.

Functions.Name: SetMinValue
Functions.Description: Set the minimum value that can be manually set in the spin box.

Functions.Name: ClearMinValue
Functions.Description: Clear the minimum value that can be manually set in the spin box.

Functions.Name: GetMaxValue
Functions.Description: Get the current maximum value that can be manually set in the spin box.

Functions.Name: SetMaxValue
Functions.Description: Set the maximum value that can be manually set in the spin box.

Functions.Name: ClearMaxValue
Functions.Description: Clear the maximum value that can be manually set in the spin box.

Functions.Name: GetMinSliderValue
Functions.Description: Get the current minimum value that can be specified using the slider.

Functions.Name: SetMinSliderValue
Functions.Description: Set the minimum value that can be specified using the slider.

Functions.Name: ClearMinSliderValue
Functions.Description: Clear the minimum value that can be specified using the slider.

Functions.Name: GetMaxSliderValue
Functions.Description: Get the current maximum value that can be specified using the slider.

Functions.Name: SetMaxSliderValue
Functions.Description: Set the maximum value that can be specified using the slider.

Functions.Name: ClearMaxSliderValue
Functions.Description: Clear the maximum value that can be specified using the slider.

Delegate.Name: OnValueChanged
Delegate.Description: Called when the value is changed interactively by the user

Delegate.Name: OnValueCommitted
Delegate.Description: Called when the value is committed. Occurs when the user presses Enter or the text box loses focus.

Delegate.Name: OnBeginSliderMovement
Delegate.Description: Called right before the slider begins to move

Delegate.Name: OnEndSliderMovement
Delegate.Description: Called right after the slider handle is released by the user
